'''wazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valuatively|valuatively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valuatively|valuatively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wazhate|wazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wazhatesher|wazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazhatesherĂ«m|wazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazhatero|wazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wazhateshĂ«|wazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazhateshĂ«m|wazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazhatero|gokiwazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwazhateshĂ«|gokiwazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazhateshĂ«m|gokiwazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowazhankerom|gowazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowazhankeshĂ«|gowazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowazhankeshĂ«m|gowazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowazhankeya|gowazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazhaterom|wazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazhatemu|wazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wazhateya|wazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazhaterom|gokiwazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazhatemu|gokiwazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwazhateya|gokiwazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wazhazhate|wazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wazhazhatesher|wazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazhazhatesherĂ«m|wazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazhazhatero|wazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wazhazhateshĂ«|wazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazhazhateshĂ«m|wazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazhazhatero|gokiwazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwazhazhateshĂ«|gokiwazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazhazhateshĂ«m|gokiwazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowazhazhankerom|gowazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowazhazhankeshĂ«|gowazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowazhazhankeshĂ«m|gowazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowazhazhankeya|gowazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wazhazhaterom|wazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wazhazhatemu|wazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wazhazhateya|wazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwazhazhaterom|gokiwazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwazhazhatemu|gokiwazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwazhazhateya|gokiwazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠte|wĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠtesher|wĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠtero|wĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠterom|wĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠtemu|wĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠzhĂŠteya|wĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafzhafte|wafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafzhaftesher|wafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafzhaftesherĂ«m|wafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafzhaftero|wafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafzhafteshĂ«|wafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafzhafteshĂ«m|wafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafzhaftero|gokiwafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafzhafteshĂ«|gokiwafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafzhafteshĂ«m|gokiwafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafzhafnkerom|gowafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafzhafnkeshĂ«|gowafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gowafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafzhafnkeya|gowafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafzhafterom|wafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafzhaftemu|wafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafzhafteya|wafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafzhafterom|gokiwafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafzhaftemu|gokiwafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafzhafteya|gokiwafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
